title: git kura worktree guard record
description: Schema for <git-common-dir>/kura/guards/worktrees/<key>.json, the cooperative guard record for a managed worktree.

key.description: The managed worktree key that owns this guard.

worktreePath.description: Absolute path of the guarded managed worktree.

createdAt.description: RFC3339 timestamp recording when the guard was acquired.
